name: Apple Cake with Rum Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
2. In a large bowl, cream butter, sugar, and egg until light and fluffy.
3. Stir in grated apples. Blend in the flour mixture.
4. Pour into a greased 8-inch square pan.
5. Bake at 400 degrees for 30-35 minutes.
6. Cool and store, covered, in the baking pan.
7. Before serving, reheat at 400 degrees for 10 minutes.
8. Cut into squares and serve with Rum Sauce.
9. To make the Rum Sauce, place butter, sugar, and half and half in a top of double boiler.
10. Cook over boiling water, stirring constantly, until slightly thickened, about 10 minutes.
11. Cool slightly.
12. Add nutmeg, vanilla, and rum.
13. Serve warm over heated cake.
